CustomField.description: AI-recommended NEPA pathway set by NEPA_CE_Screener. Human NEPA Coordinator must confirm and set nepa_review_type__c before the pathway is official. Satisfies Salesforce AI AUP and OMB M-24-10 human-in-the-loop requirement: AI recommends, human decides.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI screening recommendation. Not official until a NEPA Coordinator reviews and confirms by setting the Review Type field.
CustomField.label: CE Pathway Recommendation (AI)
